available_checks.command: python3 -c "from pathlib import Path; text = Path('index.html').read_text(encoding='utf-8') if Path('index.html').exists() else ''; ok = '<!DOCTYPE html>' in text and '<body' in text and '</html>' in text; raise SystemExit(0 if ok else 1)"

python3 -c "from pathlib import Path; text = Path('index.html').read_text(encoding='utf-8') if Path('index.html').exists() else ''; lower = text.lower(); has_title = 'Agent Flow' in text; has_form = '<form' in lower; has_action = any(item in text for item in ['Get Started', 'Try Now', 'Start', 'Login', 'Sign In', '登录', '提交']); has_button = '<button' in lower or 'type=\"submit\"' in lower; raise SystemExit(0 if has_title and ((has_form and has_button) or has_action) else 1)"

smoke_commands: python3 -c "from pathlib import Path; raise SystemExit(0 if Path('README.md').exists() else 1)"
